title: CADO Gift Card

Relevance is determined by content specifically about CADO’s gift card ecosystem, its partner network, and functionality; documents about other gift cards (e.g., Bonobo) or unrelated retail services are not relevant.

title: Lamb Tajine Recipe

narrative: The user is seeking an authentic yet adaptable lamb tagine recipe that includes key ingredients such as lemon confit, ras el hanout, and olives, with clear preparation steps and cooking times (20–25 minutes). Relevance is determined by recipes that explicitly mention these ingredients and techniques, and particularly those that include user-submitted modifications like substituting potatoes with basmati rice and vegetables. Recipes that misidentify the cut of meat (e.g., 'lamb mice') or lack specific preparation details are not relevant.

title: Lotus Elise Price

title: Solar Window Film

Relevant documents must detail legal standards, product specifications, and functional advantages; irrelevant results include unrelated 3D models, toys, or non-automotive products.

title: Graduate School of War

title: Unemployment Benefits
description: What are the eligibility criteria and calculation rules for unemployment benefits (ARE) for private employees in France seeking to return to work?
narrative: The user is a private sector employee who has recently lost their job and wants to understand whether they qualify for unemployment benefits (ARE) in France, and if so, how the amount is determined. Relevance is based on detailed information about qualifying work periods (minimum 6 months in 24 months), registration requirements with Pôle emploi, conditions for benefit calculation (including reference daily salary, degressivity thresholds, deferred compensation rules), and options for benefit reinstatement or election between prior and new entitlements. Documents that discuss intermittent work, regime switching, or general employment advice without focusing on ARE eligibility and calculation are not relevant.

title: AXA Customer Portal
description: How can individuals in metropolitan France access and use their AXA client space for insurance and banking services?
narrative: The user is an AXA customer in metropolitan France seeking to securely log in to their personal client space to manage insurance policies, file claims, or access banking services. Documents must clarify the distinction between insurance and banking portals, provide official URLs (e.g., https://client.axa.fr/), and offer guidance for password recovery or authentication issues.

title: Electric Car Costs
description: What are the total costs and financial incentives for purchasing a new or used electric vehicle in France?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the purchase price range of electric cars in France, including available government subsidies such as the ecological bonus, conversion premium, and retrofit aid, as well as exemptions like registration tax. Relevance is determined by documents that explicitly mention pricing, financial incentives, eligibility criteria, and comparisons with internal combustion engine vehicles. Documents that only mention electric cars in passing, focus on unrelated models like the Renault Twizy without cost details, or discuss technical battery specs without financial context are not relevant.

title: Bicarbonate for Late Blight
description: What is an effective, non-toxic bicarbonate-based treatment for preventing or controlling late blight in tomatoes and potatoes?
narrative: The user is a home gardener seeking a safe, affordable, and environmentally friendly alternative to chemical fungicides for combating late blight (Phytophthora infestans) in vegetable crops like tomatoes and potatoes. Relevance is determined by documents that provide specific, actionable recipes using bicarbonate (baking soda), including mixing ratios (e.g., 1 tablespoon per liter of water), application methods (e.g., spraying), and supporting benefits such as non-toxicity, biodegradability, and effectiveness as a preventive measure. Documents discussing other potato varieties, general gardening tips, or unrelated diseases (e.g., aphids, rhizoctonia) are not relevant.

title: Potato Diseases

title: Employment Bonus

narrative: The user seeks information about the French Employment Bonus (Prime pour l'emploi or PEP), including its eligibility criteria, payment structure, and its replacement by the Activity Bonus (Prime d'activité) on January 1, 2016. Irrelevant documents discussing the Christmas Bonus or unemployment benefits are not applicable, as they pertain to different social benefits and timeframes.
